source.excerpt: Group revenue also increased 4% to £624.3m (2025: £601.1m)
In the core Autotrader business, we achieved revenues of £585.3m, an increase of 4% on 2025.
with Autorama revenue contributing £39.0m (2025: £36.3m).
Group operating profit increased by 4% to £392.7m (2025: £376.8m),
Operating profit in the core Autotrader business was £408.0m (2025: £394.0m), up 4% on last year,
with an operating profit margin of 70% (2025: 70%).
Autorama saw reduced operating losses of £2.0m (2025: £4.3m).
Group operating profit margin remained consistent at 63% (2025: 63%).
Basic earnings per share (+8% YoY) 34.17p
Cash generated from operations (+5% YoY) £418m
giving total dividends of 11.6 pence per share for the year (2025: 10.6 pence per share).
We are proposing a final dividend of 7.8 pence per share (2025: 7.1 pence per share)
purchasing 58.5 million shares in the year, 6.6% of issued share capital.
At year end we had drawn £165m of our debt facility, increasing leverage up to 0.3x.
Combined with dividends we have returned £463.2m (2025: £275.7m) to shareholders.

financial_figures.label: Total returned to shareholders over three years

source.excerpt: RETURNED TO SHAREHOLDERS £989.2m returned to shareholders over the past three years
broadly maintaining Group central costs at £13.3m (2025: £12.9m).

financial_figures.label: Employees proud to work at Autotrader

source.excerpt: 2026 72% of employees proud to work at Autotrader (2025: 91%)
20% of total staff are ethnically diverse (2025: 19%)
RECORD NUMBERS OF BUYERS USING OUR PLATFORM 81.7m monthly visits
548m monthly minutes

business_facts.statement: Autotrader operates as a marketplace platform connecting buyers and sellers of cars, with a software and data platform that supports profitable retailing from sourcing through to sale.

source.excerpt: For retailers, we are increasingly a software and data platform that supports profitable retailing from sourcing through to sale.

business_facts.statement: Autotrader maintains a large and highly engaged audience, strong brand trust, and network effects between buyers and sellers. The company's competitive position has strengthened when measured against other automotive marketplaces.

source.excerpt: We have maintained our large and highly engaged audience, strong brand trust and the network effects between buyers and sellers on our platform. Our competitive position has strengthened when measured against other automotive marketplaces.

business_facts.statement: Autotrader includes AI-powered Co-Driver product, continued roll-out of Deal Builder, and launched Buying Signals. The company is using over 50 AI models across operations, combining advanced Large Language Models with proprietary real-time dataset.

source.excerpt: we included our AI-powered Co-Driver product within our pricing and packaging event, continued the roll-out of Deal Builder, and launched Buying Signals.

business_facts.statement: Record numbers of buyers using the platform at 81.7m monthly visits in 2026, up from 81.6m in 2025. Autotrader users spend 6x more time on the platform than all main competitors combined.

source.excerpt: RECORD NUMBERS OF BUYERS USING OUR PLATFORM 81.7m monthly visits (2025: 81.6m) 6x more time spent on Autotrader than all our main competitors combined (2025: 6x)

business_facts.statement: The average number of retailer forecourts in the period was down 0.5% to 13,942 in 2026 from 14,013 in 2025.

source.excerpt: The average number of retailer forecourts in the period was down 0.5% to 13,942 (2025: 14,013)

risk_disclosures.description: More challenging market conditions with increased cost pressure for retailers and manufacturers. Challenging end to the year which impacts growth in both 2026 and 2027.

source.excerpt: despite more challenging market conditions, with continued strong demand and constrained supply, added to by increased cost pressure for retailers and manufacturers.

risk_disclosures.description: Rapidly changing technology environment presents competitive risk. While AI will change how many users begin their research, a trusted, up-to-date information source will remain important to maintain market position.

source.excerpt: Despite a rapidly changing technology environment, our current competitive position has strengthened, we are adapting our car buying experience to evolve with consumer habits, and we remain comfortable our investment in technology is sufficient to take full advantage of AI.

risk_disclosures.description: Received increased levels of feedback in November on the roll-out of some new products, indicating potential customer dissatisfaction with product changes.

source.excerpt: Having received increased levels of feedback in November on the roll-out of some of these products, we remain committed to delivering value to customers and will continue to listen and evolve our product offering.

strategic_items.description: Three interconnected strategic focus areas: (1) Marketplace - Be the best place to buy and sell a car; (2) Platform - Be the industry's data and technology platform; (3) Digital retailing - Be the enabler for more to be done online. Working responsibly is embedded into everything.

source.excerpt: Our strategy has three focus areas that are closely interconnected, with working responsibly embedded into everything we do: MARKETPLACE Platform Digital retailing Be the best Be the industry's Be the enabler place to buy data and for more to be and sell a car technology done online platform

strategic_items.description: New partnership with the national charity Good Things Foundation and Greater Manchester Combined Authority (GMCA) to tackle digital exclusion. The output will create a five-year roadmap to help shape future policy.

source.excerpt: DIGITAL INCLUSION Tackling digital exclusion through a new partnership with the national charity, Good Things Foundation and Greater Manchester Combined Authority ('GMCA'). The output will create a five-year roadmap to help shape future policy.

strategic_items.description: Autotrader has a long track record of strong cash generation which it expects to continue. Capital allocation policy focuses on investment in the business supporting growth, while returning approximately one third of net income to shareholders through dividends.

source.excerpt: Autotrader has a long track record of strong cash generation which we expect to continue. Autotrader's capital allocation policy continues to focus on investment in the business supporting growth, while returning approximately one third of net income to shareholders through dividends.

strategic_items.description: Autotrader has accelerated its share buyback programme, purchasing 58.5 million shares in the year (6.6% of issued share capital). Over 2026 and 2027, the company expects to return over £1bn to shareholders through combined share buyback and dividend programmes.

source.excerpt: In the year, we have accelerated our share buyback programme, purchasing 58.5 million shares in the year, 6.6% of issued share capital. In aggregate this returns over £1bn to shareholders over the course of 2026 and 2027.

management_commentary.statement: We are already seeing the application of AI improve the buyer experience, automate retailer tasks and enhance colleague productivity. While AI will change how many users begin their research, buying a car remains a complex, time-consuming journey for a high-value item, where inventory changes daily. We believe a trusted, up-to-date information source will remain an important part of the journey and Autotrader is well placed to continue in this role.

source.excerpt: We are already seeing the application of AI improve the buyer experience, automate retailer tasks and enhance colleague productivity. While AI will change how many users begin their research, buying a car remains a complex, time-consuming journey for a high-value item, where inventory changes daily. We believe a trusted, up-to-date information source will remain an important part of the journey and Autotrader is well placed to continue in this role.

management_commentary.statement: Delivered growth in revenue and profit this year, despite more challenging market conditions, with continued strong demand and constrained supply, added to by increased cost pressure for retailers and manufacturers. The Board recognises there has been a challenging end to the year which impacts growth in both 2026 and 2027, although we have seen a gradual increase in some of our core metrics as we've entered the new financial year.

source.excerpt: Autotrader delivered growth in revenue and profit this year, despite more challenging market conditions, with continued strong demand and constrained supply, added to by increased cost pressure for retailers and manufacturers.

management_commentary.statement: The Board believes the prevailing Autotrader share price does not reflect the Company's underlying fundamentals or long-term prospects. Despite a rapidly changing technology environment, our current competitive position has strengthened, we are adapting our car buying experience to evolve with consumer habits, and we remain comfortable our investment in technology is sufficient to take full advantage of AI.

source.excerpt: The Board believes the prevailing Autotrader share price does not reflect the Company's underlying fundamentals or long-term prospects. Despite a rapidly changing technology environment, our current competitive position has strengthened, we are adapting our car buying experience to evolve with consumer habits, and we remain comfortable our investment in technology is sufficient to take full advantage of AI.

management_commentary.statement: Having received increased levels of feedback in November on the roll-out of some of these products, we remain committed to delivering value to customers and will continue to listen and evolve our product offering.

source.excerpt: Having received increased levels of feedback in November on the roll-out of some of these products, we remain committed to delivering value to customers and will continue to listen and evolve our product offering.

management_commentary.statement: In 2027 we currently expect to return £600m to shareholders. This will be through purchasing c.£500m of shares (we will be seeking authority to purchase up to 15% of issued share capital at our AGM), as well as paying a third of net income in dividends. Based on current assumptions, this would increase leverage to c.1.0x.

source.excerpt: in 2027 we currently expect to return £600m to shareholders. This will be through purchasing c.£500m of shares (we will be seeking authority to purchase up to 15% of issued share capital at our AGM), as well as paying a third of net income in dividends. Based on current assumptions, this would increase leverage to c.1.0x.
Average retailer forecourts advertising with us for the year decreased by 0.5% to 13,942 (2025: 14,013)
Average revenue per retailer ('ARPR') increased 5% (or £141) to £2,995 (2025: £2,854).
Despite higher average live car listings of 451,000 (2025: 449,000)
The number of calls on these technology and data services increased to an average of 155 million per month (2025: 91 million)
We retained record numbers of buyers, with an average number of cross-platform visits of 81.7 million per month (2025: 81.6 million).
estimate our GHG emissions during the year were 55% higher at c.144.1k tonnes of CO₂ across Scopes 1, 2 and 3 (2025: 93.2k tonnes).
At the end of March 2026, women represented 43% of our organisation (March 2025: 44%)
Ethnically diverse employees represent 20% of our organisation (March 2025: 19%)
Employee engagement has fallen to 72% from 91% a year ago.
In the year, we have continued to scale Deal Builder, with over 6.7k retailers on the product (March 2025: 2.0k)
175k vehicles live at the end of March (March 2025: 84k).

financial_figures.label: Deal Builder deals with full reservation placed

source.excerpt: In the year, we saw 137k deals with a full reservation placed (2025: 49k)

financial_figures.label: EV share of new car stock

source.excerpt: Supported the EV transition, with EVs making up 24% of new car stock.

business_facts.statement: Autotrader is 11x larger than its nearest competitor in terms of time on site against a collection of four brands, and 22x larger than the next largest individual brand.

source.excerpt: We were 11x larger (2025: 10x) than our nearest competitor in terms of time on site, which was against a collection of four brands. We were 22x larger (2025: 23x) than the next largest individual brand

business_facts.statement: Six times more time is spent on Autotrader than all main competitors combined, with 67% of Autotrader's audience unique to the platform.

source.excerpt: six times more time was spent on Autotrader than all our main competitors combined. 67% of our audience was unique to Autotrader, not visiting these other sites.

business_facts.statement: Autotrader's proprietary dataset is integrated with over 220 technology partners, and the company holds the broadest view of the UK car market with almost 300 people in customer-facing teams using tools to identify operational opportunities and performance metrics.

source.excerpt: integrated with over 220 technology partners, and increasingly central to finance and insurance companies. We have almost 300 people in our customer-facing teams, who are equipped with tools that identify operational opportunities, problem vehicles, areas of future risk and opportunity and performance variation across different retail sites.

business_facts.statement: Co-Driver, a generative AI-powered product, automates vehicle description generation and vehicle highlights for retailers, with 86% of retailers having used one of the Co-Driver tools since launch, generating 1.9 million descriptions and 700k smart image re-orders.

source.excerpt: 86% of retailers have used one of our Co-Driver tools since launch. There have been 1.9 million descriptions generated and 700k smart image re-orders.

business_facts.statement: Autotrader launched Buying Signals in January 2026, a proprietary machine learning product that flags high-intent leads converting at twice the average rate, already featured on over 800k enquiries.

source.excerpt: In January 2026, we launched our Buying Signals product, which uses a proprietary machine learning model trained on verified but anonymised sales transactions and consumer interactions. Buying Signals has already featured on over 800k enquiries, and early results indicate that leads flagged as high-intent convert at twice the average rate.

business_facts.statement: Deal Builder has been scaled to 6.7k retailers (up from 2.0k in March 2025) with 175k vehicles live at end of March 2026, generating 137k deals with full reservation placed (2025: 49k).

source.excerpt: In the year, we have continued to scale Deal Builder, with over 6.7k retailers on the product (March 2025: 2.0k) and 175k vehicles live at the end of March (March 2025: 84k). In the year, we saw 137k deals with a full reservation placed (2025: 49k)

business_facts.statement: Over 80% of Autotrader visits are direct (via mobile apps, URL, or brand searches), 13% from organic search, and only 4% from paid web traffic; less than 1% of audience comes from generative AI chat assistants.

source.excerpt: over 80% of our visits were either direct to our mobile apps, direct to our URL or through searches for "Autotrader"; 13% were from organic search; and only 4% from paid for web traffic. Currently less than 1% of audience comes from generative AI chat assistants.

business_facts.statement: Autotrader receives approximately 9 million unique visitors monthly with 548 million minutes of activity on site (2025: 557 million), with cross-platform visits averaging 81.7 million per month.

source.excerpt: This year, on average each month, we saw over nine million unique visitors, averaging 548 million (2025: 557 million) minutes of activity on site.

business_facts.statement: Autotrader has fully transitioned to a modern cloud-based delivery and data platform based largely on open-source technologies, with an AI platform allowing quick build, training and roll-out of AI services using a range of foundational Large Language Models.

source.excerpt: We have already transitioned fully to a modern cloud-based delivery and data platform based largely on open-source technologies. The highly performant, reliable and consistent architecture allows us to build new features quickly on stable foundations. The recent addition of an AI platform built using the same principles allows us to quickly build, train and roll-out AI services and products utilising a wide range of foundational Language Models

risk_disclosures.description: Consumer behaviour is shifting towards conversational chat interfaces powered by LLMs, which could reduce reliance on traditional search and marketplace functionality. However, car buying is described as a high-value, multi-step regulated process where each vehicle is unique and changes daily.

source.excerpt: Consumer behaviour is changing, with increased use of conversational chat interfaces powered by LLMs. We expect this trend to continue, with AI taking on more of the buying experience for many goods sold online. Whilst this change presents some risk, car buying is a high-value, multi-step and often regulated process, where each vehicle is unique and changes daily.

risk_disclosures.description: Retailer sentiment softened during the year due to difficult cost-related trading conditions and concerns with the speed and nature of the Deal Builder product roll-out, leading to a slight decrease in retailer numbers.

source.excerpt: Retailer numbers softened slightly during the year, reflecting both the more difficult cost-related trading conditions and concerns with the speed and nature of our Deal Builder product roll-out.

risk_disclosures.description: Employee engagement has fallen significantly from 91% to 72% due to restructures, external factors, and a tighter approach to working in the office during a challenging year.

source.excerpt: Employee engagement has fallen to 72% from 91% a year ago. It has been a challenging year for colleagues with restructures, external factors and a tighter approach to working in the office.

risk_disclosures.description: GHG emissions increased 55% to 144.1k tonnes CO₂, driven by one-off capital expenditure on the new office and an increase in the number of vehicles taken on balance sheet by Autorama.

source.excerpt: estimate our GHG emissions during the year were 55% higher at c.144.1k tonnes of CO₂ across Scopes 1, 2 and 3 (2025: 93.2k tonnes). The majority of our emissions are Scope 3, with the increase driven by both one-off capital expenditure on our new office and an increase in the number of vehicles taken on balance sheet by Autorama.

strategic_items.description: Develop and scale AI-enabled products and services using proprietary models and LLMs, including Co-Driver for automated vehicle descriptions and highlights, Buying Signals for high-intent lead identification, and ChatGPT integration via Model Context Protocol with plans for additional integrations.

source.excerpt: Our product and technology organisation includes a growing data science and analytics community and has had ongoing research partnerships with Manchester Metropolitan University and the University of Manchester to the cloud since 2019, focused on Natural Language Processing and Large Language Models, producing academic whitepapers and insights that inform internal development.

strategic_items.description: Continue investing in cloud-based infrastructure, open-source technologies, and a modern AI platform to maintain competitive advantage while building new features quickly on stable foundations.

source.excerpt: Our technology platform reflects decades of consistent, long-term investment. We have already transitioned fully to a modern cloud-based delivery and data platform based largely on open-source technologies. The highly performant, reliable and consistent architecture allows us to build new features quickly on stable foundations.

strategic_items.description: Scale Deal Builder to additional retailers with custom integrations for large customers, focusing on improving retailer conversion and reducing manual effort through AI-powered automation.

source.excerpt: Within the 6.7k retailers, we have started onboarding some of our largest customers with custom integrations. In the year, we saw 137k deals with a full reservation placed (2025: 49k), which continue to be the very best enquiries in terms of conversion to sale.

strategic_items.description: Expand technology and data services to finance, insurance, and manufacturer partners through APIs and integrations, with the goal of embedding Autotrader data into decision-making processes across the broader automotive industry.

source.excerpt: The use of our data also extends beyond just retailers to become an important industry asset, integrated with over 220 technology partners, and increasingly central to finance and insurance companies. We see further opportunity in continuing to expand this capability to deliver business improvements to a range of automotive industry participants.

strategic_items.description: Integrate leasing offers into core Autotrader search experience and build a scalable and robust checkout journey to enable growth in the personal leasing channel (PCH) as volumes return.

source.excerpt: We continued to focus on integrating leasing offers into the core Autotrader search experience. The goal is to enable a more scalable and robust checkout journey on all platforms and to ensure we are set up to grow profitably as volume returns to the personal leasing channel

strategic_items.description: Achieve net zero emissions by 2040 and halve carbon emissions by 2030, with targets validated by the Science Based Targets initiative (SBTi).

source.excerpt: We are committed to being net zero by 2040 and halving our carbon emissions by 2030, targets which have been validated by the Science Based Targets initiative

management_commentary.statement: Group operating profit is expected to be £395m – £415m for financial year 2027, with an accelerated level of share buybacks supporting at least high single digit Basic EPS growth.

source.excerpt: Group operating profit is expected to be £395m – £415m for financial year 2027. With an accelerated level of share buybacks, we anticipate at least high single digit Basic EPS growth.

management_commentary.statement: Management expects to maintain Group operating profit margins (excluding Vehicle & Accessory sales) at current levels and expects Autotrader revenue to grow in the second half of 2026 following improvements in paid stock and package penetration.

source.excerpt: Group operating profit margins, excluding Vehicle & Accessory sales, will be at least maintained. Autotrader revenue was flat year-on-year in April 2026, due to a decline in paid stock and package penetration are now improving, and we expect to grow in the second half.

management_commentary.statement: Average retailer forecourts are expected to be 1-2% lower for the full year, with stock expected to recover from current levels to minus £30-40 over the next 12 months.

source.excerpt: Average retailer forecourts are now growing but will be 1-2% lower for the full year. Stock will recover resulting in an improvement from current levels to minus £30-40 for the year

management_commentary.statement: Autotrader is committed to delivering more, higher quality enquiries that convert at double the rate into sales, which has always been at the core of the Deal Builder proposition and drives long-term value for buyers, retailers, and Autotrader.

source.excerpt: We are committed to delivering more, higher quality enquiries, that convert at double the rate into sales for our customers, which has always been at the core of our Deal Builder proposition.

management_commentary.statement: AI capability over the next few years is expected to be as significant a technology transition as the internet, mobile, big data, cloud and machine-learning combined, with Autotrader well positioned to provide richer experiences for buyers and better tooling for retailers.

source.excerpt: We believe the shift in AI capability over the next few years will be as big if not a bigger technology transition than the internet, mobile, big data, cloud and machine-learning.

management_commentary.statement: Autotrader expects Autorama to make a small profit for the year, with Commission & Ancillary revenue growing 8-12% and Vehicle & Accessory sales of approximately £40m.

source.excerpt: We expect Autorama to make a small profit for the year, with Commission & Ancillary revenue growing 8-12% and Vehicle & Accessory sales of c.£40m.

management_commentary.statement: Co-Driver reduces the average time taken to list a vehicle from 28 minutes to 5 minutes, which is significant when multiplied across more than 340,000 vehicles uploaded monthly by retailers.

source.excerpt: Co-Driver which anecdotally reduces the average time taken to list a vehicle from 28 minutes to 5 minutes, which is significant when multiplied across more than 340,000 vehicles uploaded every month by retailers.
with over 6.7k retailers on the product (March 2025: 2.0k)
175k vehicles live at the end of March (March 2025: 84k)

financial_figures.label: Employee pride in working for Autotrader

source.excerpt: 72% of employees say they're proud to work for Autotrader (2025: 91%)
2026 with 7.7 million transactions, representing steady 1% year-on-year growth
with average values averaging £17,597 across financial year 2026
New car registrations grew 5% over the past 12 months to 2.1 million (2025: 2.0 million)

financial_figures.label: Electric vehicle share of new car registrations

source.excerpt: EVs achieving a record 23.4% share (nearly half a million registrations)
reaching 37 million today
Last year we recorded nearly one billion platform visits to Autotrader

business_facts.statement: Autotrader is the UK's largest automotive marketplace and leading digital platform for the automotive industry, with an industry-leading technology and data platform increasingly used across the automotive industry.

source.excerpt: Creating value as the UK's largest automotive marketplace and leading digital platform for the automotive industry

business_facts.statement: Autotrader launched Deal Builder, with 6.7k retailers on the product and 175k vehicles live as of March 2026, and has launched Buying Signals which uses AI-driven signals to identify high-intent leads and buyer preferences.

source.excerpt: we have continued to roll out Deal Builder, with over 6.7k retailers on the product (March 2025: 2.0k) and 175k vehicles live at the end of March (March 2025: 84k)

business_facts.statement: Autotrader recorded nearly one billion platform visits in the financial year, helping partners' stock turn over at a highly profitable pace.

source.excerpt: Last year we recorded nearly one billion platform visits to Autotrader, helping our partners' stock to continue turning over at a highly profitable pace.

business_facts.statement: The used car market concluded 2026 with 7.7 million transactions, representing steady 1% year-on-year growth, with average used vehicle prices at £17,597 across financial year 2026.

source.excerpt: the used car market demonstrated exceptional resilience throughout the financial year, 2026 with 7.7 million transactions, representing steady 1% year-on-year growth

business_facts.statement: New car registrations grew 5% over the past 12 months to 2.1 million (2025: 2.0 million), with electric vehicles achieving a record 23.4% share.

source.excerpt: New car registrations grew 5% over the past 12 months to 2.1 million (2025: 2.0 million)

risk_disclosures.description: The market faces structural supply headwinds as 2.5 million 'lost' pandemic registrations age through the vehicle parc, resulting in a forecasted 17% drop in availability of 5-7-year-old vehicles over the next two years.

source.excerpt: the market faces structural supply headwinds as the estimated 2.5 million "lost" pandemic registrations age through the vehicle parc. This shortfall is now maturing into a "cliff edge" for middle-aged stock, resulting in a forecasted 17% drop in the availability of 5-7-year-old vehicles over the next two years

risk_disclosures.description: Mixed messaging from Government regarding electric vehicles is risking interest in EVs, as a newly proposed pay per mile EV tax (Electric Vehicle Excise Duty) threatens to erode the cost savings of running an EV.

source.excerpt: mixed messaging from the Government is risking interest in EVs, as a newly proposed pay per mile EV tax (Electric Vehicle Excise Duty) threatens to erode the cost savings of running an EV

risk_disclosures.description: In November 2025, Autotrader received negative sentiment around Deal Builder products, requiring customer listening sessions, product variations, testing of front-end consumer journeys, and language changes around 'Deals'.

source.excerpt: In November 2025, we received some negative sentiment around the Deal Builder products. We subsequently held customer listening sessions, made product variations, tested various front-end consumer journeys and changed the language around "Deals" which was causing confusion for some customers

strategic_items.description: Digital retailing strategy to be the enabler for more to be done online, with focus on delivering more, higher quality enquiries that convert at high rates for customers. Core proposition is Deal Builder, with Buying Signals launched to identify high-intent leads and buyer preferences.

source.excerpt: Digital retailing – Be the enabler for more to be done online

strategic_items.description: ESG strategy underpinned by purpose of 'Driving Change Together. Responsibly', focused on being a responsible business. Established Responsible Change Forum to drive forward ESG priorities.

source.excerpt: Our ESG strategy is underpinned by our purpose of Driving Change Together. Responsibly.

strategic_items.description: Continuing to bring more of the car buying journey online, leveraging unparalleled data and AI-powered tools to help retailers navigate supply gaps and fully capitalise on strong levels of buyer engagement.

source.excerpt: by leveraging our unparalleled data and AI-powered tools, retailers are well equipped to navigate these supply gaps, adapt their forecourts, and fully capitalise on the very strong levels of buyer engagement

strategic_items.description: Developing leaders through investment in tools and resources and 'Leader as Coach' programme. Launched first T-Level placement and expanded L4 software engineering apprenticeship.

source.excerpt: Developing our leaders through investment in tools and resources and our "Leader as Coach" programme.

management_commentary.statement: The UK car market is moving closer to 10 million total transactions, effectively returning the industry to its pre-pandemic scale for the first time since 2019. The combined new and used car market demonstrates exceptional resilience with underlying drivers of a growing population, expanding parc and increasing transaction volumes remaining firmly in place.

source.excerpt: the combined UK car market is moving closer to 10 million total transactions, effectively returning the industry to its pre-pandemic scale for the first time since 2019

management_commentary.statement: Retailer gross margins remain consistently stable between 9% and 11%. As vehicle values rise, higher vehicle prices reliably translate into higher absolute gross profits, underpinning robust, growing profit for the industry.

source.excerpt: Crucially, as vehicle values rise, two decades, reaching 37 million today. historical data shows retailer gross margins remain consistently stable between 9% and 11%.

management_commentary.statement: Management believes that delivering more, higher quality enquiries that convert at high rates will drive long-term value for buyers, retailer customers and Autotrader, while being difficult for others to replicate due to the data and technology moat.

source.excerpt: This ensures we strive to make a positive difference to our people, our communities, the industries we operate in and the wider environment to create a more accessible, equitable and sustainable future.

business_facts.statement: The company's purpose is Driving Change Together, focused on driving change in an industry that needs to evolve to adapt to changing consumer needs and the mainstream adoption of electric vehicles.

source.excerpt: Our purpose is Driving Change Together. Responsibly We are driving change in an industry that needs to evolve to adapt to changing consumer needs, and the changing product, as electric vehicles become the mainstream.

business_facts.statement: The business model brings together a diverse set of stakeholders including consumers, customers (retailers, manufacturers and other customers), suppliers and partners, underpinned by a collaborative, people-led culture.

source.excerpt: We are committed to acting responsibly through our focus on diversity and inclusion, the environment, our sustainability practices and maintaining high levels of ethical conduct, trust and transparency.

strategic_items.description: Committed to acting responsibly with focus on diversity and inclusion, environmental sustainability practices, and maintaining high ethical conduct standards, trust and transparency.

source.excerpt: We are committed to acting responsibly through our focus on diversity and inclusion, the environment, our sustainability practices and maintaining high levels of ethical conduct, trust and transparency.

business_facts.statement: Autotrader operates across three main segments: Autotrader (core marketplace), Trade revenue (Retailer, Platform, Home Trader and other smaller revenue streams), and Autorama (Vehicle & Accessory sales and Commission & Ancillary revenue).

source.excerpt: Trade revenue grew by 4% and £531.3m, reflecting contributions from Retailer, Platform Home Trader and other smaller revenue streams. Autorama generated £39.0m of revenue, comprising £29.6m from Vehicle & Accessory sales and £9.4m from Commission & Ancillary revenue.

business_facts.statement: Autotrader accounts for over 75% of all minutes spent on automotive classified sites and is 11x larger than its nearest competitor.

source.excerpt: were 11x larger than our nearest competitor.

business_facts.statement: The business model operates on a per-retailer subscription basis, with pricing delivered through annual product and pricing events.

source.excerpt: Our annual pricing and packaging event combined a like-for-like price increase with additional products, including core Co-Driver.

risk_disclosures.description: Stock had a negative contribution in the year due to a small decline in retailers and some customers moderating spend in the fourth quarter, indicating sensitivity to macroeconomic conditions and customer spending patterns.

source.excerpt: Stock had a negative contribution in the year due to a small decline in retailers and some customers moderating spend in the fourth quarter.

risk_disclosures.description: Deal Builder product roll-out experienced pushback from retailers related to the speed and nature of implementation, affecting retailer base growth.

source.excerpt: the pushback related to the speed and nature of our Deal Builder product roll-out.

risk_disclosures.description: GHG emissions increased 55% year-on-year to 144.1k tonnes CO2, primarily due to greater volume of vehicles sold by Autorama passing through the balance sheet and capex incurred for Manchester office relocation.

source.excerpt: Most of our CO emiss 2 ions are Scope 3; the material increase is attributable to a greater volume of vehicles sold by Autorama that pass through the balance sheet and the capex incurred as part of our Manchester office relocation.

strategic_items.description: Marketplace platform strategy focused on attracting car buyers with continued investment in user engagement despite economic uncertainty.

source.excerpt: Continued high levels of demand from car buyers, despite continued economic uncertainty, account for over 75% of all minutes spent on automotive classified sites

strategic_items.description: Digital retailing capabilities being rolled out through Deal Builder product, though experiencing retailer adoption challenges.

source.excerpt: the pushback related to the speed and nature of our Deal Builder product roll-out.

strategic_items.description: Pricing and product strategy leveraging annual packaging events with expansion of ancillary products such as Co-Driver to drive average revenue per retailer growth.

source.excerpt: Our annual pricing and packaging event combined a like-for-like price increase with additional products, including core Co-Driver.

strategic_items.description: Workforce optimization with FTE levels stabilizing at 1,244 (down 2% from prior year) to match current resource requirements.

source.excerpt: as we stabilise resourcing levels currently required to support the business.

management_commentary.statement: Group revenue increased by 4% year-on-year, with ARPR grew 5%/£141 in the year to £2,995, driven by product and pricing levers. Stock had a negative contribution in the year due to a small decline in retailers and some customers moderating spend in the fourth quarter.

source.excerpt: Group revenue increased by 4% year-on-year, with ARPR grew 5%/£141 in the year to £2,995, driven by our product and pricing levers. Stock had a negative contribution in the year due to a small decline in retailers and some customers moderating spend in the fourth quarter.

management_commentary.statement: Group operating profit increased by 4% to £392.7m, reflecting the increase in revenue and reduced losses of £2.0m in Autorama.

source.excerpt: Group operating profit increased by 4% to £392.7m, reflecting the increase in revenue and reduced losses of £2.0m in Autorama.

management_commentary.statement: Average monthly cross-platform visits marginally increased to 81.7 million per month, with continued high levels of demand from car buyers despite economic uncertainty underpinning strong visit numbers.

source.excerpt: Average monthly cross-platform visits marginally increased to 81.7 million per month (2025: 81.6 million). Continued high levels of demand from car buyers, despite continued economic uncertainty, account for over 75% of all minutes spent on automotive classified sites and were 11x larger than our nearest competitor.

management_commentary.statement: The average number of retailer forecourts decreased 1% to 13,942, reflecting difficult trading conditions and pushback related to the speed and nature of the Deal Builder product roll-out.

source.excerpt: This reflects both the difficult trading conditions and the pushback related to the speed and nature of our Deal Builder product roll-out.

management_commentary.statement: Employee engagement (proud to work at Autotrader) reduced significantly to 72% in FY2026 from 91% in FY2025. Management remains committed to improving this measure over the next 12 months.

source.excerpt: This year we saw a reduction in our proud to work at Autotrader KPI to 72%. We remain committed to improving this measure over the next 12 months.

business_facts.statement: Autotrader operates a multi-revenue platform including Retailer, Home Trader, Consumer Services (Private and Motoring Services), and Manufacturer & Agency segments, with Trade revenue comprising Retailer, Home Trader and other streams.

source.excerpt: Trade, which comprises revenue from Retailer, Home Trader and other smaller revenue streams

business_facts.statement: Autotrader platform had 451,000 average live cars advertised in 2026 (up from 449,000 in 2025), with 13,942 retailer forecourts (down from 14,013 in 2025).

source.excerpt: The average number of retailer forecourts advertising on our platform declined 0.5% to 13,942 (2025: 14,013). Average revenue per retailer ('ARPR') per month increased by 5% to £2,995

business_facts.statement: Autorama delivered 8,056 vehicles in 2026 (5,302 cars, 2,520 vans, 234 pickups) with 3,804 deliveries from Autotrader (predominantly cars), more than tripling Autotrader-related deliveries from 976 units in 2025.

source.excerpt: Total deliveries amounted to 8,056 units (2025: 6,268), which comprised 5,302 cars (2025: 2,124), 2,520 vans (2025: 3,498) and 234 pickups (2025: 646). Deliveries from Autotrader, which were predominantly cars, increased over three times to 3,804 (2025: 976).

business_facts.statement: The Group employed an average of 1,138 full-time equivalent employees in 2026 (2025: 1,140), with Autorama employing 106 FTEs on average (2025: 127).

source.excerpt: The average number of full-time equivalent employees ('FTEs') remained broadly flat at 1,138 (2025: 1,140), reflecting the stable resourcing levels currently required to support the business.

business_facts.statement: From financial year 2027, Autorama will operate and be reported as a single operating segment with the rest of the Autotrader Group, following more than half of all leasing transactions being delivered through the Autotrader platform in the second half of 2026.

source.excerpt: From financial year 2027, Autorama will operate and be reported as a single operating segment with the rest of the Autotrader Group as more than half of all leasing transactions were delivered through the Autotrader platform in the second half of financial year 2026.

management_commentary.statement: For financial year 2027, we expect revenue to continue the acceleration of share buybacks, purchasing c.£500m. We expect marketing to increase in financial year 2027. Share-based payments are expected to be £14m in 2027.

source.excerpt: For financial year 2027, we expect revenue to continue the acceleration of share buybacks, purchasing c.£500m. 2026

management_commentary.statement: ARPR growth was driven by the product and price levers, with a negative contribution from the stock lever. Price contributed £117 to ARPR growth driven by the 1 April 2025 pricing and product event combining a like-for-like price increase with additional products.

source.excerpt: ARPR growth was driven by the product and price levers, with a negative contribution from the stock lever. growth was driven by the product and product event, which combined a like-for-like price increase with additional products.

management_commentary.statement: From November 2025, prompted by the speed and nature of our Deal Builder product and reflecting more difficult trading conditions, a number of retailers reduced the number of vehicles advertised on the platform, contributing to lower paid stock levels.

source.excerpt: From November 2025, prompted by the speed and nature of our Deal Builder product and reflecting more difficult trading conditions, a number of retailers reduced the number of vehicles advertised on the platform

management_commentary.statement: The Directors consider the Group to have sufficient resources to continue as a going concern given its robust balance sheet, flexible liquidity position, and a Syndicated RCF which has recently increased to £300m and is committed until February 2030.

source.excerpt: With a robust balance sheet, flexible liquidity position and a Syndicated RCF, which has recently increased to £300m and is committed until February 2030, the Directors consider the Group to have sufficient resources to continue as a going concern.

business_facts.statement: Autotrader has the largest and most engaged automotive audience in the UK, with external measures confirming this position.

source.excerpt: External measures show that we have the largest and most engaged automotive audience.

business_facts.statement: Autotrader is the largest and most trusted automotive classified brand in the UK according to company research.

source.excerpt: Our research shows that we are the largest and most trusted automotive classified brand in the UK.

business_facts.statement: Autotrader has launched Deal Builder, Buying Signals, and an AI platform for quickly productionising AI products.

source.excerpt: We launched Buying Signals which enables retailers to prioritise leads from high-intent buyers. We continue to invest heavily in our technology platforms. In FY26 we launched an AI platform which enables us to quickly productionise AI products.

business_facts.statement: Autotrader's customers include retailers and manufacturers, with exposure to both new and used car markets.

source.excerpt: We also work with OEMs to develop solutions to enable them to advertise their new car pipeline stock on our website.

business_facts.statement: In January 2026, Autotrader moved to a new, state-of-the-art office in Manchester with increased capacity and improved facilities.

source.excerpt: In January 2026, we moved to a new, state-of-the-art office in Manchester. This increased capacity and provided improved facilities, enabling better collaboration and productivity.

risk_disclosures.description: Exposure to global macro events could result in customers being unable to trade, leading to loss of revenue, stock, audience and market share. Geo-political instability remains high with potential knock-on impacts from supply chain disruption affecting used car stock pipeline and affordability.

source.excerpt: We consider there to be a threat to the short-to-mid-term performance of our business posed by unpreventable macro events. Such events could result in our customers being unable to spend and trade, leading to loss of revenue, stock, audience and market share.

risk_disclosures.description: Adverse changes in supply versus demand for new/used cars will affect retailer profitability. Higher operating costs and interest rates could affect retailer profitability and reduce their advertising spend with Autotrader. This year saw a tough trading environment for customers with higher operating costs and interest rates affecting profitability.

source.excerpt: This year saw a tough trading environment for our customers. Higher operating costs and interest rates on stocking loans during the last year put financial pressures on our customers, affecting their profitability.

risk_disclosures.description: The Digital Markets, Competition and Consumers Act came into force during the financial year placing new obligations around consumer protections. In March 2026 the CMA announced an investigation into online reviews across multiple companies including Autotrader and Feefo, still in early stages.

source.excerpt: The Digital Markets, Competition and Consumers Act came into force during the financial year. In March 2026 the CMA announced an investigation into online reviews across a number of companies, including Autotrader and our third party moderator, Feefo. The investigation is still in the very early stages and Autotrader is cooperating fully with the CMA.

risk_disclosures.description: Emergence of agentic AI presents both opportunity and disruption risk. Risks include AI being used to disintermediate marketplaces and AI being used to direct consumers directly to adverts, negating the need for retailers to purchase prominence.

source.excerpt: The emergence of agentic AI presents opportunity but also has the potential to disrupt online marketplaces. Risks include: AI being used to disintermediate marketplaces like Autotrader; and AI being used to direct consumers directly to relevant adverts, negating the need for retailers to purchase prominence.

risk_disclosures.description: Amazon is expected to launch Amazon Autos in the UK, presenting a new competitive threat from a large technology organization operating in the automotive sector.

source.excerpt: We expect Amazon to launch Amazon Autos in the UK which would be a new competitor.

risk_disclosures.description: As a digital business relying on IT infrastructure, a disruptive cyber security or business continuity incident could lead to system downtime. Additionally, as AI models become more sophisticated, there is a risk they could be used by bad actors to discover and exploit zero-day vulnerabilities.

source.excerpt: As a digital business, we rely on our IT infrastructure to provide our services. A disruptive cyber security and/or business continuity incident could lead to downtime of our systems and infrastructure. As AI models become increasingly sophisticated, there is a risk that they could be used by bad actors.

risk_disclosures.description: Employee engagement declined from 91% to 72%. Factors affecting employee morale include restructuring during FY26, recent fall in share price, and negative sentiment from retailers regarding Deal Builder scaling.

source.excerpt: These factors have been reflected in our current measure of employee engagement, which saw a decline from 91% to 72%.

strategic_items.description: Marketplace Platform - core strategic priority focusing on strengthening the marketplace with investments in product development, brand, and customer engagement.

source.excerpt: OUR STRATEGIC PRIORITIES Marketplace Platform Digital retailing Working responsibly

strategic_items.description: Digital Retailing - strategic priority to expand online buying experience and new car offerings on the platform.

source.excerpt: OUR STRATEGIC PRIORITIES Marketplace Platform Digital retailing Working responsibly

strategic_items.description: Working Responsibly - strategic priority encompassing responsible business practices, brand protection, and responsible innovation.

source.excerpt: OUR STRATEGIC PRIORITIES Marketplace Platform Digital retailing Working responsibly

strategic_items.description: Scaling of new car advertising - ambitions to grow in new car market and work with OEMs to enable them to advertise new car pipeline stock on the platform.

source.excerpt: Our ambitions to grow in new car could increase our exposure to the direct impacts of macro risks. We also work with OEMs to develop solutions to enable them to advertise their new car pipeline stock on our website.

strategic_items.description: Scaling of Leasing and related products - expansion of product offerings referenced in compliance context as part of ambitions alongside new car.

source.excerpt: Our obligations under GDPR and FCA regulations will continue as we scale and evolve Leasing, Deal Builder and Buying Signals, as well as our ambitions in new car.

strategic_items.description: Autotrader commenced 'listening' sessions within the business aimed at increasing employee engagement following decline from 91% to 72%.

source.excerpt: We commenced 'listening' sessions within the business aimed at increasing engagement.

management_commentary.statement: New car supply increased in FY26 including strong supply from Chinese manufacturers. This coupled with consistently high consumer demand presents a positive outlook for the used car market in the coming years.

source.excerpt: New car supply increased in FY26, including strong supply from Chinese manufacturers. This, coupled with consistently high consumer demand, presents a positive outlook for the used car market in the coming years.

management_commentary.statement: The FCA's redress scheme for mis-sold car finance does not impact Autotrader directly. The FCA have stated that the impact on the automotive finance market will be limited, reducing uncertainty compared to prior years.

source.excerpt: The FCA's redress scheme for mis-sold car finance does not impact us directly and whilst there will be an impact on lenders, the FCA have stated that the impact on the automotive finance market will be "limited", reducing the level of uncertainty that we have seen in prior years.

management_commentary.statement: Autotrader is evolving its retailer engagement strategy in response to resistance to Deal Builder rollout to ensure customers have a voice in how products are shaped, including through Customer Advisory Groups.

source.excerpt: Our roll-out of Deal Builder in the autumn was met with resistance from some retailers. We are evolving our retailer engagement strategy to ensure that our customers have a voice in how we shape our products, which includes Customer Advisory Groups with diverse representation from across our retailer customers.

management_commentary.statement: Autotrader launched a new marketing campaign, 'It's Time for Autotrader', designed to target the 25-34 year-old demographic, estimated to reach 96% of this demographic in the UK.

source.excerpt: We launched our new marketing campaign, 'It's Time for Autotrader', which was designed to target the 25-34 year-old demographic. We estimate that this campaign will reach 96% of this demographic in the UK.

management_commentary.statement: Autotrader maintains a high Trustpilot rating of 4.7 out of 5 with fraud levels remaining low.

source.excerpt: The level of fraud remains low and our Trustpilot rating remains high at 4.7 out of 5.

management_commentary.statement: Despite competitive and AI disruption risks, the marketplace saw continued record levels of cross-platform visits in the last year.

source.excerpt: Despite these factors, our marketplace remains strong and last year saw continued record levels of cross-platform visits.

business_facts.statement: The Group is the UK's largest and most engaged automotive marketplace, with the largest volume of in-market car buyers and the most influential website a consumer visits when purchasing a vehicle.

source.excerpt: the Group is the UK's largest and most engaged automotive marketplace, with the largest volume of in-market car buyers and the most influential website a consumer visits when purchasing a vehicle

business_facts.statement: The Group's Vehicle Check product has been successfully rolled out and the company is now entirely self-sufficient by sourcing all data directly from source, rather than via intermediary organisations.

source.excerpt: Our Vehicle Check product has been successfully rolled out and we are now entirely self-sufficient by sourcing all data directly from source, rather than via intermediary organisations.

business_facts.statement: Retailers can use Autotrader's systems to access services and data, whereas others use third-party technology systems that have been integrated with.

source.excerpt: Retailers can use Autotrader's systems to access our services and data, whereas others use third-party technology systems that we have integrated with.

business_facts.statement: In calendar year 2025, EVs made up approximately 23% of all new car registrations, below the 28% target set by the ZEV mandate, with the target for calendar year 2026 increasing to 33%.

source.excerpt: In the calendar year 2025, EVs made up c.23% of all new car registrations, below the 28% target set by the ZEV mandate. The target for calendar year 2026 increases to 33%

risk_disclosures.description: The shift from internal combustion engines (ICE) to electric vehicles (EVs) could prompt changes to car buyer behaviour. Barriers to mass consumer adoption of EVs include high price compared to ICE equivalents, potential improvements in public transport, changing government policy and reduced incentives such as increasing taxes on EVs, range anxiety, and anxiety over residual value of EVs. Changing and more stringent regulatory requirements could increase cost base.

source.excerpt: The shift from internal combustion engines ('ICE') to electric vehicles ('EVs') could prompt changes to car buyer behaviour. Factors which might inhibit mass consumer adoption of EVs include: the high price of EVs compared to ICE equivalents; potential for improvements in public transport; changing Government policy and reduced incentives such as increasing taxes on EVs; range anxiety; and anxiety over the residual value of EVs. Changing and more stringent regulatory requirements could increase our cost base.

risk_disclosures.description: To achieve strategic objectives, the Group is reliant on partners to support product initiatives, including lenders integrated with the Deal Builder journey. Reliance also exists on third parties for technology infrastructure, vehicle data supply, financing, and fulfilment of some revenue-generating products.

source.excerpt: To achieve our strategic objectives, we are reliant on partners to support certain product initiatives, for example having lenders integrated with our Deal Builder journey is a key dependency. We also rely on third parties to support our technology infrastructure, to supply vehicle data and financing, and in the fulfilment of some of our revenue generating products.

risk_disclosures.description: A cyber attack affecting the Group or key supplier could lead to data loss, disruption to systems and infrastructure, regulatory fines, and reputational damage. Maximum GDPR fine is 4% of Group revenue.

source.excerpt: A cyber attack affecting either the Group or a key supplier could lead to data loss and disruption to the Group's systems and infrastructure, resulting in reduced revenue, additional costs of regulatory fines, remediation and reputational damage. This scenario assumes a cyber incident that triggers the maximum General Data Protection Regulation ('GDPR') fine (4% of Group revenue)

risk_disclosures.description: Increased competition risk includes potential takeover of a competitor by a well-capitalised third party or entry of a new player that could develop superior consumer experience or retailer products including AI-driven tools, potentially disintermedating the marketplace and disrupting market share.

source.excerpt: This scenario assumes a shift in the competitive landscape following the takeover of a competitor by a well-capitalised third party or the entry of a new player. A competitor could develop a superior consumer experience or retailer products, including AI-driven tools that disintermediate the marketplace or route consumers directly to specific vehicles.

risk_disclosures.description: Carbon emissions have increased this year owing to the initial costs of the new office and the practice of purchasing vehicles within the Leasing business. Vehicle purchases is the primary source of carbon emissions and this activity will continue in the near future, leading to higher carbon emissions attributable to the Group versus prior years.

source.excerpt: Historically, our carbon emissions have been relatively low. However, they have increased this year owing to two primary factors: the initial costs of our new office; and the practice of purchasing vehicles within our Leasing business. Vehicle purchases is the primary source of our carbon emissions and this activity will continue in the near future, leading to higher carbon emissions attributable to the Group versus prior years.

strategic_items.description: The Group aims to continue growing its marketplace through playing a larger role in new car sales and advertising, surfacing the power of artificial intelligence which will enhance existing data products, and moving more of the car buying process online.

source.excerpt: The Group's aim is to continue growing its marketplace, which includes playing a larger role in new car sales and advertising, to surface the power of artificial intelligence ('AI') which will enhance our existing data products, and to move more of the car buying process online.

strategic_items.description: Growth in the use of data, being the industry standard platform, and further embedding data into the automotive ecosystem to give buyers and retailers up-to-date insight.

source.excerpt: growth in the use of our data, being the industry standard platform and further embedding our data into the automotive ecosystem, giving buyers and retailers up-to-date insight

strategic_items.description: Growth in areas outside of advertising, continuing to evolve products and consumer experience to bring more of the car buying process online.

source.excerpt: growth in areas outside of advertising, as we continue to evolve both our products and consumer experience, bringing more of the car buying process online

strategic_items.description: The company introduced the Responsible Change Forum to bring senior stakeholders together to shape and oversee ESG strategy.

source.excerpt: We introduced the Responsible Change Forum. This brings senior stakeholders together to shape and oversee our ESG strategy.

management_commentary.statement: Price disparity between ICE and EVs has remained a barrier to mass-adoption of EVs despite discounts aimed at stimulating demand. Additional barriers include price inequality between public and private charging, and anxiety around the availability and reliability of public EV charging.

source.excerpt: Despite discounts aimed at stimulating demand for EVs, price disparity between ICE and EVs has remained a barrier to mass-adoption of EVs. Additional barriers include price inequality between public and private charging, and anxiety around the availability and reliability of public EV charging.

management_commentary.statement: There is a pipeline of EVs flowing through to used vehicles, and the company's data indicates that consumer appetite for used EVs is strong.

source.excerpt: We are seeing a pipeline of EVs flowing through to used, and our data indicates that consumer appetite for used EVs is strong.

management_commentary.statement: Despite the ongoing geo-political risks over the last year, the supplier-base has remained resilient with no major disruption or downtime arising from suppliers.

source.excerpt: Despite the ongoing geo-political risks over the last year, our supplier-base has remained resilient. We have not experienced any major disruption or downtime arising from suppliers.

management_commentary.statement: Key assumptions in the financial forecasts include sustained growth in the marketplace as the Group continues to develop its platform and invest in search experience, growth in data usage, growth outside advertising through evolving products and bringing more of the car buying process online, and increase in costs largely through salaries as the Group grows.

source.excerpt: sustained growth in our marketplace, as we continue to develop our platform and invest in our search experience; growth in the use of our data, being the industry standard platform and further embedding our data into the automotive ecosystem, giving buyers and retailers up-to-date insight; growth in areas outside of advertising, as we continue to evolve both our products and consumer experience, bringing more of the car buying process online; and increase in costs largely through salaries as the Group continues to grow, supporting and developing new products.

management_commentary.statement: The Board has assessed the Group's viability and prospects over a five-year period to March 2031, considering detailed financial forecasts covering customer numbers, stock levels, ARPR, revenue, profit, cash flow and key financial ratios, with stress testing demonstrating the Group would be able to withstand severe scenarios due to significant free cash flow, access to the Syndicated RCF and ability to adjust discretionary share buyback programme.

source.excerpt: The results of the stress testing demonstrated that due to the Group's significant free cash flow, access to the Syndicated RCF and the Board's ability to adjust the discretionary share buyback programme, it would be able to withstand the impact of any of these scenarios, remain cash generative and meet the obligations of its debt facility.
